content.summary: Outputs a solid-color image. Useful as background, fill, or uniform input.

examples.label: Set solid red background
examples.code:
c = op('constant1')
c.par.colorr = 1.0
c.par.colorg = 0.0
c.par.colorb = 0.0
c.par.colora = 1.0

examples.label: Set semi-transparent white
examples.code:
c = op('constant1')
c.par.colorr = 1.0
c.par.colorg = 1.0
c.par.colorb = 1.0
c.par.colora = 0.5

examples.label: Pulse color with audio
examples.description: Drive the red channel from an audio input CHOP.
